description_long: This is a robust wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, featuring three prominent black metal hoops encircling its body for structural reinforcement. The wood staves are vertically aligned, showing a natural brown grain texture with visible knots and grooves, giving it a rustic and weathered appearance. The top is open, revealing a hollow interior, and the rim is slightly uneven, suggesting hand-crafted construction. One side of the barrel is fitted with a small metal spigot, indicating it can be used to dispense liquids. The metal bands are fastened with round rivets, and the surface of the wood appears slightly rough and matte. This type of barrel is commonly found in urban settings such as taverns, markets, or storage areas, serving as a container for liquids or dry goods.
description: A rustic wooden barrel reinforced with black metal hoops and fitted with a metal spigot, featuring a rough, natural wood texture and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, wood grain, and three black metal hoops with no visible spigot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal hoops and a partial view of the spigot protruding from the right side.
description_view_2: View with the spigot fully visible on the front, showing the open top and reinforced bands.
description_view_3: Rear view with the spigot on the left side, displaying the wood texture and metal hoops without any additional features.
